book: THE GOSPEL ACCORDING TO ST. MATTHEW

verses.text: \+w Then\+w* shall \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of heaven\+w* \+w be likened\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w ten\+w* \+w virgins\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w took\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w lamps\+w*, \+w and went\+w* \+w forth\+w* \+w to meet\+w* \+w the bridegroom\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w five\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w were\+w* \+w wise\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w five\+w* \+add were\+add* \+w foolish\+w*.
\+w They that\+w* \+add were\+add* \+w foolish\+w* \+w took\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w lamps\+w*, \+w and took\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w oil\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w them\+w*:
\+w But\+w* \+w the wise\+w* \+w took\+w* \+w oil\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w vessels\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w lamps\+w*.
\+w While\+w* \+w the bridegroom\+w* \+w tarried\+w*, \+w they\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w slumbered\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w slept\+w*.
\+w And\+w* at \+w mid\+w*\+w night\+w* \+w there was\+w* \+w a cry\+w* \+w made\+w*, \+w Behold\+w*, \+w the bridegroom\+w* \+w cometh\+w*; \+w go ye\+w* \+w out\+w* \+w to meet\+w* \+w him\+w*.
\+w Then\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w those\+w* \+w virgins\+w* \+w arose\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w trimmed\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w lamps\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w the foolish\+w* \+w said\+w* \+w unto the wise\+w*, \+w Give\+w* \+w us\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w oil\+w*; \+w for\+w* \+w our\+w* \+w lamps\+w* \+w are gone out\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w the wise\+w* \+w answered\+w*, \+w saying\+w*, \+add Not so\+add*; \+w lest\+w* \+w there be\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w enough\+w* \+w for us\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w you\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w go ye\+w* \+w rather\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w them that sell\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w buy\+w* \+w for yourselves\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w while\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w went\+w* \+w to buy\+w*, \+w the bridegroom\+w* \+w came\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w they that were ready\+w* \+w went in\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w the marriage\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w the door\+w* \+w was shut\+w*.
\+w Afterward\+w* \+w came\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w other\+w* \+w virgins\+w*, \+w saying\+w*, \+w Lord\+w*, \+w Lord\+w*, \+w open\+w* \+w to us\+w*.
\+w But\+w* \+w he answered\+w* \+w and said\+w*, \+w Verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w I know\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w not\+w*.
\+w Watch\+w* \+w therefore\+w*, \+w for\+w* \+w ye know\+w* \+w neither\+w* \+w the day\+w* \+w nor\+w* \+w the hour\+w* \+w wherein\+w* \+w the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w* \+w cometh\+w*.

¶ \+w For\+w* \+add the kingdom of heaven is\+add* \+w as\+w* \+w a man\+w* \+w travelling into a far country\+w*, \+add who\+add* \+w called\+w* \+w his own\+w* \+w servants\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w delivered\+w* \+w unto them\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w goods\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w unto one\+w* \+w he gave\+w* \+w five\+w* \+w talents\+w*, \+w to another\+w* \+w two\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w to another\+w* \+w one\+w*; \+w to every man\+w* \+w according to\+w* \+w his several\+w* \+w ability\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w straightway\+w* \+w took his journey\+w*.

\+w Then\+w* \+w he that had received\+w* \+w the five\+w* \+w talents\+w* \+w went\+w* \+w and traded\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w the same\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w made\+w* \+add them\+add* \+w other\+w* \+w five\+w* \+w talents\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w likewise\+w* \+w he that\+w* \+add had received\+add* \+w two\+w*, \+w he\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w gained\+w* \+w other\+w* \+w two\+w*.
\+w But\+w* \+w he that had received\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w went\+w* \+w and digged\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the earth\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w hid\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w lord’s\+w* \+w money\+w*.
\+w After\+w* \+w a\+w* \+w long\+w* \+w time\+w* \+w the lord\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w those\+w* \+w servants\+w* \+w cometh\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w reckoneth\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w them\+w*.

\+w And so\+w* \+w he that had received\+w* \+w five\+w* \+w talents\+w* \+w came\+w* \+w and brought\+w* \+w other\+w* \+w five\+w* \+w talents\+w*, \+w saying\+w*, \+w Lord\+w*, \+w thou deliveredst\+w* \+w unto me\+w* \+w five\+w* \+w talents\+w*: \+w behold\+w*, \+w I have gained\+w* \+w beside\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w five\+w* \+w talents\+w* \+w more\+w*.

\+w His\+w* \+w lord\+w* \+w said\+w* \+w unto him\+w*, \+w Well done\+w*, \+add thou\+add* \+w good\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w faithful\+w* \+w servant\+w*: \+w thou hast been\+w* \+w faithful\+w* \+w over\+w* \+w a few things\+w*, \+w I will make\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w ruler\+w* \+w over\+w* \+w many things\+w*: \+w enter thou\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the joy\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w lord\+w*.

\+w He\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w that had received\+w* \+w two\+w* \+w talents\+w* \+w came\+w* \+w and said\+w*, \+w Lord\+w*, \+w thou deliveredst\+w* \+w unto me\+w* \+w two\+w* \+w talents\+w*: \+w behold\+w*, \+w I have gained\+w* \+w two\+w* \+w other\+w* \+w talents\+w* \+w beside\+w* \+w them\+w*.

\+w His\+w* \+w lord\+w* \+w said\+w* \+w unto him\+w*, \+w Well done\+w*, \+w good\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w faithful\+w* \+w servant\+w*; \+w thou hast been\+w* \+w faithful\+w* \+w over\+w* \+w a few things\+w*, \+w I will make\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w ruler\+w* \+w over\+w* \+w many things\+w*: \+w enter thou\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the joy\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w lord\+w*.

\+w Then\+w* \+w he which had received\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w talent\+w* \+w came\+w* \+w and said\+w*, \+w Lord\+w*, \+w I knew\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w thou art\+w* \+w an\+w* \+w hard\+w* \+w man\+w*, \+w reaping\+w* \+w where\+w* \+w thou hast\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w sown\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w gathering\+w* \+w where\+w* \+w thou hast\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w strawed\+w*:

\+w And\+w* \+w I was afraid\+w*, \+w and went\+w* \+w and hid\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w talent\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the earth\+w*: \+w lo\+w*, \+add there\+add* \+w thou hast\+w* \+add that is\+add* \+w thine\+w*.

\+w His\+w* \+w lord\+w* \+w answered\+w* \+w and said\+w* \+w unto him\+w*, \+add Thou\+add* \+w wicked\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w slothful\+w* \+w servant\+w*, \+w thou knewest\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w I reap\+w* \+w where\+w* \+w I sowed\+w* \+w not\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w gather\+w* \+w where\+w* \+w I have\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w strawed\+w*:

\+w Thou\+w* \+w oughtest\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w to have put\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w money\+w* \+w to the exchangers\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+add then\+add* \+w at my coming\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w should have received\+w* \+w mine own\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w usury\+w*.
\+w Take\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w the talent\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w give\+w* \+add it\+add* \+w unto him which hath\+w* \+w ten\+w* \+w talents\+w*.

\+w For\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w every\+w* \+w one that hath\+w* \+w shall be given\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w he shall have abundance\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w that hath\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w shall be taken\+w* \+w away\+w* \+w even\+w* \+w that which\+w* \+w he hath\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w cast ye\+w* \+w the unprofitable\+w* \+w servant\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w outer\+w* \+w darkness\+w*: \+w there\+w* \+w shall be\+w* \+w weeping\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w gnashing\+w* \+w of teeth\+w*.

¶ \+w When\+w* \+w the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w* \+w shall come\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w glory\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w holy\+w* \+w angels\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w then\+w* \+w shall he sit\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w the throne\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w glory\+w*:

\+w And\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w shall be gathered\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w nations\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w he shall separate\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w another\+w*, \+w as\+w* \+w a shepherd\+w* \+w divideth\+w* \+add his\+add* \+w sheep\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w the goats\+w*:
\+w And\+w* \+w he shall set\+w* \+w the sheep\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w right hand\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w the goats\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w the left\+w*.

\+w Then\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w the King\+w* \+w say\+w* \+w unto them\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w right hand\+w*, Come, \+w ye\+w* \+w blessed\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w*, \+w inherit\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w prepared\+w* \+w for you\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w the foundation\+w* \+w of the world\+w*:

\+w For\+w* \+w I was an hungred\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ye gave\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w meat\+w*: \+w I was thirsty\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ye gave\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w drink\+w*: \+w I was\+w* \+w a stranger\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ye took\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w in\+w*:

\+w Naked\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ye clothed\+w* \+w me\+w*: \+w I was sick\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ye visited\+w* \+w me\+w*: \+w I was\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w prison\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ye came\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w me\+w*.

\+w Then\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w the righteous\+w* \+w answer\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w saying\+w*, \+w Lord\+w*, \+w when\+w* \+w saw we\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w an hungred\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w fed\+w* \+add thee\+add*? \+w or\+w* \+w thirsty\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w gave thee drink\+w*?
\+w When\+w* \+w saw we\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w a stranger\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w took thee in\+w*? \+w or\+w* \+w naked\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w clothed\+w* \+add thee\+add*?
\+w Or\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w saw we\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w sick\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w prison\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w came\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w thee\+w*?

\+w And\+w* \+w the King\+w* \+w shall answer\+w* \+w and say\+w* \+w unto them\+w*, \+w Verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w Inasmuch\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w ye have done\+w* \+add it\+add* \+w unto\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of the least\+w* \+w of these\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w brethren\+w*, \+w ye have done\+w* \+add it\+add* \+w unto me\+w*.

\+w Then\+w* \+w shall he say\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w unto them\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w the left hand\+w*, \+w Depart\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w ye cursed\+w*, \+w into\+w* \+w everlasting\+w* \+w fire\+w*, \+w prepared\+w* \+w for the devil\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w angels\+w*:
\+w For\+w* \+w I was an hungred\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ye gave\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w meat\+w*: \+w I was thirsty\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ye gave\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w drink\+w*:

\+w I was\+w* \+w a stranger\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ye took\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w in\+w*: \+w naked\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ye clothed\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w not\+w*: \+w sick\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w prison\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ye visited\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w not\+w*.

\+w Then\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w answer\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w saying\+w*, \+w Lord\+w*, \+w when\+w* \+w saw we\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w an hungred\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w athirst\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w a stranger\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w naked\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w sick\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w prison\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w did\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w minister\+w* \+w unto thee\+w*?

\+w Then\+w* \+w shall he answer\+w* \+w them\+w*, \+w saying\+w*, \+w Verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w Inasmuch\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w ye did\+w* \+add it\+add* \+w not\+w* \+w to one\+w* \+w of the least\+w* \+w of these\+w*, \+w ye did\+w* \+add it\+add* \+w not\+w* \+w to me\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w these\+w* \+w shall go away\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w everlasting\+w* \+w punishment\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w the righteous\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w life\+w* \+w eternal\+w*.
